SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.spi

Class EntityCacheMetrics

java.lang.Object
st.orm.core.spi.EntityCacheMetrics
All Implemented Interfaces:
EntityCacheMetricsMXBean
public final class EntityCacheMetrics extends Object implements EntityCacheMetricsMXBean
Singleton JMX MBean for entity cache metrics.

Registered as st.orm:type=EntityCacheMetrics in the platform MBean server. All transaction-scoped EntityCacheImpl instances report to this single metrics collector. If JMX registration fails, metrics are still collected in-memory and accessible via getInstance().

Since:
1.9

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    long
    getClears()
    Number of full cache clears.
    long
    getEvictions()
    Number of cache entries cleaned up after garbage collection.
    long
    getGetHitRatioPercent()
    Get hit ratio as a percentage (0-100).
    long
    getGetHits()
    Number of get() calls that returned a cached entity.
    long
    getGetMisses()
    Number of get() calls where no cached entity was available.
    long
    getGets()
    Total number of get() calls.
    static EntityCacheMetrics
    getInstance()
    Returns the singleton metrics instance.
    long
    getInternHitRatioPercent()
    Intern hit ratio as a percentage (0-100).
    long
    getInternHits()
    Number of intern() calls that reused an existing canonical instance.
    long
    getInternMisses()
    Number of intern() calls that stored a new or updated instance (no reusable entry found).
    long
    getInterns()
    Total number of intern() calls.
    long
    getRemovals()
    Number of cache entries removed due to entity mutations (insert, update, delete).
    Map<String,String>
    getRetentionPerEntity()
    Returns the effective CacheRetention per entity type.

    Resets all counters to zero.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static EntityCacheMetrics getInstance()
      Returns the singleton metrics instance.

    • registerEntity

      public void registerEntity(String entityType, String retention)
      Registers the effective cache retention for the given entity type.
      Parameters:
      entityType - the simple class name of the entity type.
      retention - the effective cache retention mode name.

    • getRetentionPerEntity

      public Map<String,String> getRetentionPerEntity()
      Description copied from interface: EntityCacheMetricsMXBean
      Returns the effective CacheRetention per entity type.

      Each key is the simple class name of the entity type, and the value is the retention mode name (e.g., "DEFAULT", "LIGHT").

      Specified by:
      getRetentionPerEntity in interface EntityCacheMetricsMXBean

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Description copied from interface: EntityCacheMetricsMXBean
      Resets all counters to zero.
      Specified by:
